steps.title: Use the Factor Theorem
steps.content: If $f(a)=0$, then $(x-a)$ is a factor of $f(x)$. The graph passes through $(-3,0)$, $(1,0)$, and $(4,0)$, so the zeros are $-3$, $1$, and $4$.

steps.title: Convert zeros to factors
steps.content: The zeros give the factors $(x+3)$, $(x-1)$, and $(x-4)$. Of the choices, only Choice C — $x-1$ must be a factor.
